title: FastAPI Dependency Injection Pattern

trigger.query: FastAPI endpoint dependency injection database session

when_to_apply: When adding or modifying FastAPI endpoints that need database access or shared services
instructions: Always use Depends() for injecting database sessions and services
Use the Repository pattern — put data access in /repositories/ directory
Define Pydantic schemas in /schemas/ directory for request/response validation
Import the get_db dependency from the existing database module
Follow the naming convention: router prefix matches the resource name
